title: NOAA Climate Change Impacts
description: A source card for NOAA's climate-change impacts collection and linked classroom resources.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA's climate change impacts collection gathers classroom-ready resources about rising temperatures, sea level, drought, flooding, wildfire, snow, ice, ecosystems, infrastructure, and human health.
The collection is especially useful for evidence-based writing because it points students toward data tools, climate dashboards, regional reports, lesson plans, videos, and background explainers.
Rights note: NOAA is a U.S. government source, but this collection also links to partners and offsite resources. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked materials.
